headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: SECOND: The Subcontractor shall begin the Subcontractor's Work within three (3) days after being notified in writing by Contractor that the applicable structure or structures are enough advanced or in such condition to allow the beginning or continuation of the Subcontractor's Work, and will carry forward and complete said work as rapidly as Contractor may require or judge that the progress of the structure will permit, unless detained by other subcontractors, or delayed due to unanticipated or unanticipatable adverse weather, acts of God or strikes or walkouts beyond the control of Subcontractor; in which event the Subcontractor will promptly notify the Contractor in writing, who (if satisfied that said delay is so caused and justified) will allow additional time sufficient in the Contractor's sole discretion and judgment to make up the time so lost and only to extend allowed by Owner. Time is of the essence of this Subcontract, and of any portion hereunder where a particular time or schedule has been established.
